seoTitle: Raglan vs Rainbow Flat — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Raglan and Rainbow Flat. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Raglan vs Rainbow Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Raglan and Rainbow Flat.
heading: Raglan vs Rainbow Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Raglan, New South Wales and Rainbow Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rainbow Flat has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Raglan (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Raglan or Rainbow Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Raglan has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Rainbow Flat scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Raglan scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Rainbow Flat scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Raglan or Rainbow Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rainbow Flat has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
